meta.name: Design Guidelines v4
meta.description: A light, kinetic design system that uses cursor-responsive atmosphere, scene-led hero composition, and narrative section flow instead of bento repetition.

display.usage: Hero headlines, scene titles, section titles, and product-brand moments.

body.usage: Body copy, controls, narrative notes, and product detail.

waveMesh.description: Soft wave mesh texture sourced online and layered under halo gradients.

haloField.description: Clean gradient field without mesh, using only light halos.

horizonWash.description: Lighter horizon-style wash with softer mesh visibility.

rules: move background light and depth layers with the cursor
never destabilize body copy or controls
prefer ambient drift over explicit animation

layoutRules: Lead with one dominant scene instead of multiple equal cards.
Use alternating story sections to guide the eye down the page.
Reserve strong containment for proof surfaces and product shells only.
Treat navigation in the product demo as a ribbon, not a sidebar stack.

dashboardFit.tradeoff: More atmospheric and memorable than flat systems, but less suitable for highly repetitive admin screens or table-heavy tools.
